en.lobby.title: VIDEO POKER TRAINER
en.support.title: HOW TO PLAY
en.support.single_play_rules: One hand, one deck. Pick cards to hold, then draw replacements. Paytable at the top shows payouts for each hand.
en.support.triple_play_rules: Three hands from three independent decks. Held cards are locked across all three hands; drawn cards are unique per hand.
en.support.five_play_rules: Same as Triple Play, with five simultaneous hands.
en.support.ten_play_rules: Same as Triple Play, with ten simultaneous hands.
en.support.ultra_vp_rules: Five hands with per-hand multipliers. Winning hands promote a multiplier to the NEXT round. Activated only at MAX BET.
en.support.spin_poker_rules: Slot-style 3x5 reel grid with 20 paylines. Every column is a reel; held columns don't re-spin on DRAW.
en.settings.title: SETTINGS
en.game_depth.title: GAME DEPTH
en.game_depth.description_single:
This number shows how many rounds you can play
with your current balance at the current bet.

Higher = longer session.
en.game_depth.description_multi:
This number shows how many rounds you can play
with your current balance at the current bet
and hand count.

Higher = longer session.
en.bet_select.title: SELECT BET
en.shop.title: FREE CHIPS
en.info.rules_single:
1. Place your bet (1-5 coins). Always bet MAX for the best Royal Flush payout.
2. Press DEAL to receive 5 cards from a standard deck.
3. Choose which cards to HOLD by tapping them.
4. Press DRAW to replace non-held cards from the same deck.
5. Your final 5-card hand is evaluated against the paytable.
6. Winning hands pay according to the paytable multiplied by your bet.
7. Wild cards (in Deuces/Joker variants) substitute for any card.
en.info.rules_multi:
1. Place your bet (1-5 coins). Max bet pays best for Royal Flush.
2. Deal 5 cards on the primary hand.
3. Choose HOLD cards — same hold applies to ALL hands.
4. Draw replacements. Each hand gets independent replacements from its own deck.
5. All hands are evaluated and paid out.
6. Use HANDS button to cycle 3/5/10/12/25 hand layouts.
en.info.rules_ultra_vp:
1. Select MAX BET to activate the Ultra VP feature (2x cost).
2. Deal 5 cards on the primary hand.
3. Hold the cards you want to keep — they apply to ALL hands.
4. Draw replacements. Each hand draws independently.
5. Winning hands pay AND grant a multiplier on that specific hand for the next round.
6. A hand that doesn't win loses its multiplier (resets to 1x).
7. Use the HANDS button to cycle 3/5/10 hand layouts.
8. Feature disabled below MAX BET — play standard multi-hand.
en.machine.bonus_poker_deluxe.feature: All quads pay 80. Two Pair pays 1.
en.machine.double_bonus.feature: Big quad bonuses. Two Pair pays 1.
en.machine.aces_and_faces.feature: Bonus for quad Aces and face cards.
en.machine.deuces_wild.feature: All 2s are wild. No pairs pay.
en.machine.joker_poker.feature: Joker is wild. Kings+ to win.
en.info_card.description:
Win → Next hand
gets multiplier!
Up to 12x
en.double.title: DOUBLE OR NOTHING
en.double.pick_card: PICK A CARD TO BEAT THE DEALER

Kicker bonus on Four of a Kind!

en.machine.triple_double_bonus.mini:
Extreme kicker payouts!

4 2s-4s + A/2/3/4: 400
Three of a Kind pays only 2
RTP: 99.58% | Very High variance

en.machine.aces_and_faces.mini:

Full House: 8 | Flush: 5

en.machine.deuces_wild.mini:
All four 2s are wild cards

5 of a Kind possible!
RTP: 99.73% | Low variance

en.machine.joker_poker.mini:
53-card deck with 1 Joker (wild)
Min hand: Pair of Kings+
5 of a Kind: 200 | Wild Royal: 100
RTP: 100.65% | Low-Medium variance
en.machine.deuces_and_joker.name: Deuces & Joker
en.machine.deuces_and_joker.mini:
5 wild cards (4 Deuces + Joker)
Min hand: Three of a Kind

Natural Royal: 4000
Highest jackpot among all variants
en.spin.select_reels: SELECT REELS TO HOLD THEN PRESS DRAW SPIN
en.spin.info_rules:
• 20 pay lines are played each round
• DEAL SPIN deals 5 cards in the middle row
• Select columns to HOLD, then press DRAW SPIN
• Held columns show the same card in all 3 rows
• Unheld columns get new cards in all 3 rows
• Each of 20 lines is evaluated independently
en.spin.info_bet: TOTAL BET = Bet per line × 20 lines × Denomination
en.settings.delete_confirm_1: Are you sure? All data will be deleted.
en.settings.delete_confirm_2: This action is irreversible. Balance, stats and progress will be reset.
en.age_gate.title: AGE CONFIRMATION
en.age_gate.disclaimer: This game is intended for an adult audience for entertainment purposes only. It does not offer real-money gambling or any opportunity to win real money or prizes. Success in social gaming does not imply future success at real-money gambling.
en.trainer.disclaimer: This game is a video poker trainer, not a casino product. The game contains no real-money gambling, prizes, or wagers. Cards are used purely as the gameplay structure for skill practice.
en.hint.royal_flush: Top hand! A K Q J 10, all one suit.
en.hint.straight_flush: Five cards in a row, all one suit.
en.hint.four_of_a_kind: Four cards of the same rank.
en.hint.full_house: Three of a kind plus a pair.
en.hint.flush: Five cards of the same suit.
en.hint.straight: Five cards in a row, any suits.
en.hint.three_of_a_kind: Three cards of the same rank.
en.hint.jacks_or_better: A pair of Jacks, Queens, Kings or Aces.
en.hint.kings_or_better: A pair of Kings or Aces.
en.hint.four_aces_with_234_kicker: Four Aces with a 2, 3 or 4 — huge!
en.hint.5_of_a_kind: Five cards of the same rank (uses wilds).
en.hint.wild_royal_flush: Royal Flush using a wild card.
en.hint.fallback: Tap a row to see how to make this hand.
en.hint.paytable_intro:
GOAL
Build the best hand from the list above.

HOW TO PLAY
Tap DEAL, keep the cards you want, swap the rest with DRAW.

en.tutor.slide3_l2: Then DRAW to swap other cards

OBJETIVO
